subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request for user 'u_9981' (senior-engineer) to 'db-payments-primary' against access control and incident response policies. Verify: (1) user's on-call status and role, (2) P1 incident classification eligibility, (3) temporary emergency access grant conditions and time limits, (4) audit logging requirements.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask assigned because the query explicitly requests governance evaluation of an access control decision against a policy registry. This is not a data reconciliation task (no cross_recon needed) nor a multi-tool orchestration (no multitool_plan). Tier is 'mid' because the decision requires multi-signal reasoning: validating user role, incident severity classification, emergency access conditions, and audit compliance—more than a single-rule check but not requiring complex cross-domain inference. No additional subtasks are needed; the policy engine itself will render the approval decision and conditions."

output.reason: Senior engineer u_9981 has active P1 incident ticket INC-20241215-0042, satisfying POL-501. POL-502 dual approval waived under declared P1 incident exception. Emergency access granted contingent on audit logging and 24-hour post-incident review per POL-503.
applied_constraints: Time-limited access tied to incident duration (auto-revoke on INC-20241215-0042 closure or 4h max)
All read_write operations logged to immutable audit trail
Access tied to incident ticket INC-20241215-0042
